name: AA_GIDER_RAPORU_YENI_KONSOLIDE
definition:
CREATE VIEW  [dbo].[AA_GIDER_RAPORU_YENI_KONSOLIDE] AS

select 
'Restar 2024' AS FIRMA,
'2024' AS YIL,
LEFT(H.CODE,3) AS ANA_KOD,
H.CODE
,H.DEFINITION_
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'

from LG_123_EMUHACC  AS H


WHERE (H.CODE LIKE'7%' OR  H.CODE LIKE'610%' OR   H.CODE LIKE'689%' OR  H.CODE LIKE'656%' OR H.CODE LIKE'264%' OR H.CODE LIKE'150%' 
OR H.CODE LIKE'253%' OR H.CODE LIKE'254%' OR H.CODE LIKE'255%' ) AND H.CODE NOT LIKE'710%' AND H.CODE NOT LIKE'711%'
--AND LEN(H.CODE)=3
AND H.CODE IN (SELECT ACCOUNTCODE FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE)

UNION ALL


select 
'Restar 2023' AS FIRMA,
'2023' AS YIL,
LEFT(H.CODE,3) AS ANA_KOD,
H.CODE
,H.DEFINITION_
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'

from LG_123_EMUHACC  AS H


WHERE (H.CODE LIKE'7%' OR  H.CODE LIKE'610%' OR   H.CODE LIKE'689%' OR  H.CODE LIKE'656%' OR H.CODE LIKE'264%' OR H.CODE LIKE'150%' 
OR H.CODE LIKE'253%' OR H.CODE LIKE'254%' OR H.CODE LIKE'255%' ) AND H.CODE NOT LIKE'710%' AND H.CODE NOT LIKE'711%'
--AND LEN(H.CODE)=3
AND H.CODE IN (SELECT ACCOUNTCODE FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE)

UNION ALL

select 
'Retech 2023' AS FIRMA,
'2023' AS YIL,
LEFT(H.CODE,3) AS ANA_KOD,
H.CODE
,H.DEFINITION_
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'

from LG_223_EMUHACC  AS H


WHERE (H.CODE LIKE'7%' OR  H.CODE LIKE'610%' OR   H.CODE LIKE'689%' OR  H.CODE LIKE'656%' OR H.CODE LIKE'264%' OR H.CODE LIKE'150%' 
OR H.CODE LIKE'253%' OR H.CODE LIKE'254%' OR H.CODE LIKE'255%' ) AND H.CODE NOT LIKE'710%' AND H.CODE NOT LIKE'711%'
--AND LEN(H.CODE)=3
AND H.CODE IN (SELECT ACCOUNTCODE FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE)

UNION ALL

select 
'Retech 2024' AS FIRMA,
'2024' AS YIL,
LEFT(H.CODE,3) AS ANA_KOD,
H.CODE
,H.DEFINITION_
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'

from LG_223_EMUHACC  AS H


WHERE (H.CODE LIKE'7%' OR  H.CODE LIKE'610%' OR   H.CODE LIKE'689%' OR  H.CODE LIKE'656%' OR H.CODE LIKE'264%' OR H.CODE LIKE'150%' 
OR H.CODE LIKE'253%' OR H.CODE LIKE'254%' OR H.CODE LIKE'255%' ) AND H.CODE NOT LIKE'710%' AND H.CODE NOT LIKE'711%'
--AND LEN(H.CODE)=3
AND H.CODE IN (SELECT ACCOUNTCODE FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE)

sample_data.DEFINITION_: GOSB FABRİKA TADİLAT VE ONARIM MALİYETLERİ
